business.name: S Prakash Decorator and Events
business.tagline: 38 years of turning your events into celebrations
business.address: 1, Kadadi Complex, Near Hotel Kamat, VIP Road, Navi Peth, Solapur - 413001, Maharashtra

hero.headline: Every occasion, beautifully decorated
hero.subheadline: 38 years of experience bringing weddings, ceremonies, and celebrations to life in Solapur.

about.heading: Nearly four decades of celebrations
about.text: Since 1988, S Prakash Decorator and Events has brought weddings, birthdays, engagements, and ceremonies to life across Solapur. From flower decoration to full event planning — including even sports and water sports events — the team is known for prompt service, thoughtful design, and reliable time management.

services.title: Flower Decoration
services.description: Fresh flower decoration for birthdays, naming ceremonies, and anniversaries.
services.longDescription: Make birthdays extra special with our vibrant and cheerful flower decorations. We offer a variety of designs that can be customized to suit the birthday person's tastes, from fun and colorful arrangements for children to elegant floral setups for adults. Our decorations include flower garlands, table decor, and personalized floral messages that bring life and joy to any birthday celebration.
list: Design Options : Variety of flower types, Different colors, Sizes
Material Used : High-quality materials used for longevity and visual appeal

services.longDescription: Flower decoration services for name ceremonies provide a beautiful and personalized touch to celebrate this significant milestone in a child's life. services.title: Decoration for Religious Functions
services.description: Decoration for religious functions involves creating a respectful and appropriate environment for ceremonies and worship.
services.longDescription: Decoration for religious functions involves creating a respectful and appropriate environment for ceremonies and worship. This service includes designing and setting up decorations that honor the religious significance of the occasion, such as altar arrangements, floral displays, and symbolic elements. The decorations are chosen to reflect the traditions and values of the religious event, ensuring that they enhance the sacred atmosphere without overshadowing the ceremony. Professional decorators work closely with religious leaders and clients to ensure that all decorations are suitable and aligned with the ceremony's requirements.
